title: Crystal Damage
description: Simple project to calculate Damage on nearby Enemies using Crystals.
body:
# Crystal Damage Estimator

This is a client-side utility mod that predicts the damage from an end crystal explosion before it occurs. It is designed for Crystal PvP players who want reliable information without guesswork.

## Features

Real-time explosion damage calculation based on:

- Player position
- Explosion origin
- Armor toughness, armor value, and enchantments
- Resistance effects

## It displays predicted damage in one of several formats:
## 
- Numeric overlay above entities
- HUD text near the crosshair
- Optional outline coloring (configurable)

_It works in both singleplayer and multiplayer, as it is purely client-side and does not need server support._

## Configuration

- Hotkey to toggle the display
- Choice between self-only, enemy-only, or both
- Adjustable precision (rounded or exact values)
- Selectable display style (text, outline, or both)

## Purpose

This mod does not automate combat. It only provides predictions of explosion outcomes to help with decision making in fast-paced PvP situations.
